excerpt: 1. 概述1.1 什么是2D RING拓扑2D RING拓扑算法并非NCCL中的独立算法标识，而是指当系统同时具备节点内（intra-node）和节点间（inter-node）通信时，RING算法在两个维度上的应用： 节点内Ring（Intra-node Ring）：同一节点内GPU之间形成环形通信节点间Ring（Inter-node Ring）：跨节点的GPU通过网络设备形成环形通信1.2 NCCL算法枚举在NCCL中，算法类型定义在 nccl_tuner.h 中：// 从 init.cc:50 可以看到算法名称 const char* …
content:
1. 概述

1.1 什么是2D RING拓扑

2D RING拓扑算法并非NCCL中的独立算法标识，而是指当系统同时具备节点内（intra-node）和节点间（inter-node）通信时，RING算法在两个维度上的应用：

  • 节点内Ring（Intra-node Ring）：同一节点内GPU之间形成环形通信
  • 节点间Ring（Inter-node Ring）：跨节点的GPU通过网络设备形成环形通信

1.2 NCCL算法枚举

在NCCL中，算法类型定义在 nccl_tuner.h 中：

// 从 init.cc:50 可以看到算法名称
const char* ncclAlgoStr[NCCL_NUM_ALGORITHMS] = { 
    "Tree",           // NCCL_ALGO_TREE = 0
    "Ring",           // NCCL_ALGO_RING = 1
    "CollNetDirect",  // NCCL_ALGO_COLLNET_DIRECT = 2
    "CollNetChain",   // NCCL_ALGO_COLLNET_CHAIN = 3
    "NVLS",           // NCCL_ALGO_NVLS = 4
    "NVLSTree",       // NCCL_ALGO_NVLS_TREE = 5
    "PAT"             // NCCL_ALGO_PAT = 6
};

2. 2D RING拓扑算法基础

2.1 拓扑模式定义

在 graph/search.cc:753-769 中定义了搜索模式：

/* Search Patterns
 *
 *     Intra-node (节点内)
 * Ring            : GPU a -> GPU b -> .. -> GPU x -> GPU a
 * 
 *     Inter-node (节点间)
 * Ring            : NET n -> GPU a -> GPU b -> .. -> GPU x -> NET n (or m if crossNic)
 */

2.2 RING模式的路径参数

// graph/search.cc:770-781
ncclResult_t ncclTopoSearchParams(struct ncclTopoSystem* system, int pattern, 
                                   int* backToNet, int* backToFirstRank) {
  if (system->inter) {  // 跨节点场景
    if (pattern == NCCL_TOPO_PATTERN_RING) 
      *backToNet = system->nodes[GPU].count-1;  // 最后一个GPU需要回连到NET
    *backToFirstRank = -1;
  } else {  // 节点内场景
    *backToNet = -1;
    if (pattern == NCCL_TOPO_PATTERN_RING) 
      *backToFirstRank = system->nodes[GPU].count-1;  // 最后一个GPU回连到第一个GPU
  }
  return ncclSuccess;
}

3. 初始化阶段

3.1 通信器初始化入口

从 init.cc:972-995 开始的初始化流程：

ncclCommInitRank()
  └─> ncclTopoGetSystem(comm, &comm->topo)           // 构建拓扑系统图
      └─> ncclTopoComputePaths(comm->topo, comm)     // 计算GPU和NIC之间的路径
          └─> ncclTopoTrimSystem(comm->topo, comm)   // 移除不可访问的GPU和未使用的NIC
              └─> ncclTopoSearchInit(comm->topo)     // 初始化拓扑搜索
                  └─> ncclTopoPrint(comm->topo)      // 打印最终拓扑

3.2 拓扑系统构建

graph/topo.cc:1412-1494 中的 ncclTopoGetSystem():

ncclResult_t ncclTopoGetSystem(struct ncclComm* comm, struct ncclTopoSystem** system, 
                                const char* dumpXmlFile) {
  // 1. 分配XML结构用于拓扑表示
  NCCLCHECK(xmlAlloc(&xml, NCCL_TOPO_XML_MAX_NODES));
  
  // 2. 尝试从环境变量或文件加载拓扑
  const char *xmlTopoFile = ncclGetEnv("NCCL_TOPO_FILE");
  if (xmlTopoFile) {
    NCCLCHECK(ncclTopoGetXmlFromFile(xmlTopoFile, xml, 1));
  }
  
  // 3. 检测当前进程管理的GPU
  char busId[NVML_DEVICE_PCI_BUS_ID_BUFFER_SIZE];
  NCCLCHECK(int64ToBusId(comm->peerInfo[comm->rank].busId, busId));
  NCCLCHECK(ncclTopoFillGpu(xml, busId, &node));
  
  // 4. 自动检测网络设备（CollNet优先）
  if (collNetSupport(comm)) {
    NCCLCHECK(ncclTopoProcessNet(xml, dumpXmlFile, &netInfo));
  }
  NCCLCHECK(ncclTopoProcessNet(xml, dumpXmlFile, &netInfo));  // 普通网络
  
  // 5. 修剪XML分支并进行拓扑融合
  NCCLCHECK(ncclTopoTrimXml(xml));
  
  return ncclSuccess;
}

4. 拓扑构建与算法选择

4.1 拓扑图搜索

graph/search.cc:991-1197 中的 ncclTopoCompute():

ncclResult_t ncclTopoCompute(ncclTopoSystem* system, struct ncclTopoGraph* graph) {
  int ngpus = system->nodes[GPU].count;
  
  // 1. 确定crossNic模式（是否跨网卡）
  int crossNic = (system->nodes[NET].count > 1) &&
    (graph->pattern == NCCL_TOPO_PATTERN_RING || 
     graph->pattern == NCCL_TOPO_PATTERN_BALANCED_TREE ||
     graph->pattern == NCCL_TOPO_PATTERN_SPLIT_TREE) ? ncclParamCrossNic() : 0;
  graph->crossNic = crossNic == 1 ? 1 : 0;
  
  // 2. 初始化带宽和延迟
  graph->bwIntra = graph->bwInter = 0;
  graph->latencyInter = 0;
  
  // 3. 获取链路类型范围
  int minTypeIntra = PATH_LOC, minTypeInter = PATH_PIX;
  if (ngpus > 1) {
    NCCLCHECK(ncclTopoGetGpuMinPath(system, GPU, &minTypeIntra));
  }
  if (system->inter) {
    NCCLCHECK(ncclTopoGetGpuMinPath(system, NET, &minTypeInter));
  }
  
  // 4. 开始搜索最优通道配置
search:
  int time = graph->sameChannels ? NCCL_SEARCH_TIMEOUT_SAMECHANNELS :
             graph->pattern == NCCL_TOPO_PATTERN_TREE ? 
             NCCL_SEARCH_TIMEOUT_TREE : NCCL_SEARCH_TIMEOUT;
  
  NCCLCHECK(ncclTopoSearchRec(system, &tmpGraph, graph, &time));
  
  // 5. 如果找到完美解，停止搜索
  if (time == -1) goto done;
  
  return ncclSuccess;
}

4.2 递归搜索逻辑

graph/search.cc:784-812 中的 ncclTopoSearchRec():

ncclResult_t ncclTopoSearchRec(struct ncclTopoSystem* system, 
                                struct ncclTopoGraph* graph, 
                                struct ncclTopoGraph* saveGraph, 
                                int* time) {
  int backToNet, backToFirstRank;
  NCCLCHECK(ncclTopoSearchParams(system, graph->pattern, &backToNet, &backToFirstRank));
  
  if (system->inter) {
    // 跨节点：从网络设备开始搜索
    ncclTopoSearchRecNet(system, graph, saveGraph, backToNet, backToFirstRank, time);
  } else {
    // 节点内：从GPU开始搜索
    if (graph->pattern == NCCL_TOPO_PATTERN_NVLS) {
      NCCLCHECK(ncclTopoSearchTryGpu(system, graph, saveGraph, 0, backToNet, 
                                      backToFirstRank, 0, time, -1, -1, graph->nChannels));
    } else if (graph->nChannels == 0) {
      // 首先尝试PCI顺序
      NCCLCHECK(ncclTopoSearchTryGpu(system, graph, saveGraph, 0, backToNet, 
                                      backToFirstRank, FORCED_ORDER_PCI, time, -1, -1, 0));
    } else {
      // 尝试重放上一通道顺序
      int g;
      NCCLCHECK(ncclTopoReplayGetGpu(system, graph, -1, &g));
      NCCLCHECK(ncclTopoSearchTryGpu(system, graph, saveGraph, 0, backToNet, 
                                      backToFirstRank, FORCED_ORDER_REPLAY, time, -1, -1, g));
    }
    
    // 尝试所有其他可能性
    if (graph->sameChannels == 0 || graph->nChannels == 0) {
      for (int g=0; g<system->nodes[GPU].count; g++) {
        NCCLCHECK(ncclTopoSearchTryGpu(system, graph, saveGraph, 0, backToNet, 
                                        backToFirstRank, 0, time, -1, -1, g));
      }
    }
  }
  return ncclSuccess;
}

4.3 GPU排序优先级

graph/search.cc:242-309 中的 ncclTopoSearchNextGpuSort():

ncclResult_t ncclTopoSearchNextGpuSort(struct ncclTopoSystem* system, 
                                        struct ncclTopoGraph* graph, 
                                        struct ncclTopoNode* gpu, 
                                        int* next, int* countPtr, int sortNet) {
  const uint64_t flag = 1ULL<<(graph->nChannels);
  int ngpus = system->nodes[GPU].count;
  struct ncclTopoLinkList* paths = gpu->paths[GPU];
  
  // 对GPU进行评分
  struct ncclGpuScore scores[NCCL_TOPO_MAX_NODES];
  int count = 0;
  for (int i=1; i<ngpus; i++) {
    int g = (start+i)%ngpus;
    if (paths[g].count == 0) continue;
    if (system->nodes[GPU].nodes[g].used & flag) continue;
    
    scores[count].g = g;
    scores[count].startIndex = i;
    scores[count].intraNhops = paths[g].count;    // 节点内跳数
    scores[count].intraBw = paths[g].bw;          // 节点内带宽
    if (netPaths) {
      scores[count].interNhops = netPaths[g].count;  // 节点间跳数
      scores[count].interPciBw = gpuPciBw(system->nodes[GPU].nodes+g);
      scores[count].interBw = netPaths[g].bw;        // 节点间带宽
    }
    count++;
  }
  
  // 按优先级排序（节点间带宽 > PCI带宽 > 节点间跳数 > 节点内带宽 > 节点内跳数）
  qsort(scores, count, sizeof(struct ncclGpuScore), cmpScore);
  
  // NVSwitch系统优先使用相邻GPU
  if (system->nodes[NVS].count) {
    if (graph->pattern == NCCL_TOPO_PATTERN_RING) {
      firstGpus[0] = nextGpu; 
      firstGpus[1] = prevGpu; 
      firstGpuCount = 2;
    }
  }
  
  return ncclSuccess;
}

5. RING算法核心代码流程

5.1 RING拓扑构建

graph/rings.cc:28-70 中的 ncclBuildRings():

ncclResult_t ncclBuildRings(int nrings, int* rings, int rank, int nranks, 
                             int* prev, int* next) {
  uint64_t* rankFound;
  NCCLCHECK(ncclCalloc(&rankFound, DIVUP(nranks, 64)));
  
  for (int r=0; r<nrings; r++) {
    int current = rank;
    
    // 遍历环中的所有rank，验证环的完整性
    for (int i=0; i<nranks; i++) {
      rankFound[current/64] |= (1<<(current%64));
      rings[r*nranks+i] = current;
      current = next[r*nranks+current];  // 跳转到下一个rank
    }
    
    // 验证环是否闭合
    if (current != rank) {
      WARN("Error : ring %d does not loop back to start (%d != %d)", r, current, rank);
      return ncclInternalError;
    }
    
    // 检查是否所有rank都在环中
    for (int i=0; i<nranks; i++) {
      uint64_t bits = rankFound[i/64], mask = 1<<(i%64);
      if ((bits & mask) == 0) {
        WARN("Error : ring %d does not contain rank %d", r, i);
        return ncclInternalError;
      }
    }
    
    memset(rankFound, 0, DIVUP(nranks, 64)*sizeof(uint64_t));
  }
  
  free(rankFound);
  return ncclSuccess;
}

5.2 RING通道结构

device.h:169-180 中定义：

struct ncclRing {
  // 快捷方式指向userRanks[1]和userRanks[n-1]
  int prev;  // 环中前一个rank
  int next;  // 环中后一个rank

  // 将内部NCCL索引映射到用户指定的rank顺序
  // 这是必需的，因为我们需要知道用户期望数据如何在设备之间排序
  int* userRanks;

  int index; // 当前rank在环中的索引
};

6. 通道连接建立

6.1 RING连接入口

transport/generic.cc:11-44 中的 ncclTransportRingConnect():

ncclResult_t ncclTransportRingConnect(struct ncclComm* comm) {
  if (comm && comm->nRanks > 1) {
    comm->useGdr = true;
    comm->useNetPXN = false;
    
    // 为每个通道建立P2P连接
    for (int c = 0; c < comm->nChannels; c++) {
      struct ncclChannel* channel = comm->channels + c;
      
      // 连接到prev和next GPU
      NCCLCHECK(ncclTransportP2pConnect(comm, c, 1, &channel->ring.prev, 
                                         1, &channel->ring.next, 0));
    }
    
    // 设置RING图的传输层
    NCCLCHECK(ncclTransportP2pSetup(comm, &comm->graphs[NCCL_ALGO_RING], 0));
    
    // 如果启用了本地注册，收集所有rank的GDR和PXN使用情况
    if (ncclParamLocalRegister() || ncclParamGraphRegister()) {
      NCCLCHECK(ncclCalloc(&ringInfo, comm->nRanks));
      ringInfo[comm->rank].useGdr = comm->useGdr;
      ringInfo[comm->rank].useNetPXN = comm->useNetPXN;
      NCCLCHECK(bootstrapAllGather(comm->bootstrap, ringInfo, sizeof(struct ringConnInfo)));
      
      for (int i = 0; i < comm->nRanks; ++i) {
        if (!ringInfo[i].useGdr) comm->useGdr = false;
        if (ringInfo[i].useNetPXN) comm->useNetPXN = true;
      }
    }
    
    INFO(NCCL_INIT, "Connected all rings, use ring PXN %d GDR %d", 
         comm->useNetPXN, comm->useGdr);
  }
  return ncclSuccess;
}

6.2 P2P连接建立

transport.cc:35-313 中的 ncclTransportP2pConnect() 和 ncclTransportP2pSetup():

ncclResult_t ncclTransportP2pConnect(struct ncclComm* comm, int channelId, 
                                      int nrecv, int* peerRecv, 
                                      int nsend, int* peerSend, int connIndex) {
  struct ncclChannel* channel = &comm->channels[channelId];
  uint64_t mask = 1UL << channel->id;
  
  // 标记接收连接
  for (int i=0; i<nrecv; i++) {
    int peer = peerRecv[i];
    if (peer == -1 || peer >= comm->nRanks || peer == comm->rank || 
        channel->peers[peer]->recv[connIndex].connected) continue;
    comm->connectRecv[peer] |= mask;
  }
  
  // 标记发送连接
  for (int i=0; i<nsend; i++) {
    int peer = peerSend[i];
    if (peer == -1 || peer >= comm->nRanks || peer == comm->rank || 
        channel->peers[peer]->send[connIndex].connected) continue;
    comm->connectSend[peer] |= mask;
  }
  
  return ncclSuccess;
}

ncclResult_t ncclTransportP2pSetup(struct ncclComm* comm, 
                                    struct ncclTopoGraph* graph, int connIndex) {
  // 为每个peer分配连接数据结构
  struct ncclConnect** data;
  NCCLCHECK(ncclCalloc(&data, maxPeers));
  
  // 轮询方式建立连接，避免死锁
  for (int i = 1; i < comm->nRanks; i++) {
    int recvPeer = (comm->rank - i + comm->nRanks) % comm->nRanks;
    int sendPeer = (comm->rank + i) % comm->nRanks;
    
    // 交换连接信息
    if (comm->connectRecv[recvPeer]) {
      NCCLCHECK(bootstrapSend(comm->bootstrap, recvPeer, bootstrapTag, 
                               sendData[sendPeer], nChannelsMax*sizeof(struct ncclConnect)));
      NCCLCHECK(bootstrapRecv(comm->bootstrap, recvPeer, bootstrapTag, 
                               recvData[recvPeer], nChannelsMax*sizeof(struct ncclConnect)));
    }
    
    // 对每个通道建立传输层连接
    for (int c = 0; c < comm->nChannels; c++) {
      struct ncclChannel* channel = comm->channels + c;
      
      // 接收端设置
      if (comm->connectRecv[recvPeer] & mask) {
        struct ncclConnector* recv = &channel->peers[recvPeer]->recv[connIndex];
        NCCLCHECK(selectTransport(comm, graph, recv, 
                                   recvData[recvPeer] + c, &recvTransportType));
      }
      
      // 发送端设置  
      if (comm->connectSend[sendPeer] & mask) {
        struct ncclConnector* send = &channel->peers[sendPeer]->send[connIndex];
        NCCLCHECK(selectTransport(comm, graph, send, 
                                   sendData[sendPeer] + c, &sendTransportType));
      }
    }
  }
  
  // 同步所有ranks以确保连接完成
  for (int i = 1; i < comm->nRanks; i++) {
    int recvPeer = (comm->rank - i + comm->nRanks) % comm->nRanks;
    int sendPeer = (comm->rank + i) % comm->nRanks;
    
    if (comm->connectSend[sendPeer] || comm->connectRecv[recvPeer]) {
      NCCLCHECK(bootstrapSend(comm->bootstrap, sendPeer, bootstrapTag, NULL, 0));
      NCCLCHECK(bootstrapRecv(comm->bootstrap, recvPeer, bootstrapTag, NULL, 0));
    }
    
    comm->connectRecv[recvPeer] = comm->connectSend[sendPeer] = 0UL;
  }
  
  return ncclSuccess;
}

6.3 传输层选择

支持的传输层类型：

  • SHM (Shared Memory): 同进程内GPU间的共享内存通信
  • P2P (Peer-to-Peer): GPU间的直接通信（IPC/CUMEM/Direct）
  • NET (Network): 跨节点的网络通信

7. AllReduce操作执行流程

7.1 入队流程

enqueue.cc:1918-1974 中的 getAlgoInfo():

static ncclResult_t getAlgoInfo(struct ncclComm* comm, struct ncclTaskColl* info,
                                 int collNetSupport, int nvlsSupport, 
                                 int numPipeOps, ncclSimInfo_t* simInfo) {
  size_t nBytes = elementSize * ncclFuncMaxSendRecvCount(info->func, comm->nRanks, info->count);
  
  // 初始化算法和协议为未定义
  info->algorithm = NCCL_ALGO_UNDEF;
  info->protocol = NCCL_PROTO_UNDEF;
  
  // 初始化代价表
  float collCostTable[NCCL_NUM_ALGORITHMS][NCCL_NUM_PROTOCOLS];
  initCollCostTable((float **)collCostTable);
  NCCLCHECK(updateCollCostTable(comm, info, nBytes, collNetSupport, nvlsSupport, 
                                  numPipeOps, (float **)collCostTable));
  
  if (comm->tuner != NULL) {
    // 使用调优器选择算法
    NCCLCHECK(comm->tuner->getCollInfo(comm->tunerContext, info->func, nBytes,
                                         numPipeOps, (float **)collCostTable, 
                                         NCCL_NUM_ALGORITHMS, NCCL_NUM_PROTOCOLS,
                                         regBuff, &nMaxChannels));
    NCCLCHECK(topoGetAlgoInfo(comm, info, nBytes, (float **)collCostTable, simInfo));
  } else {
    // 使用默认的基于拓扑的调优
    NCCLCHECK(topoGetAlgoInfo(comm, info, nBytes, (float **)collCostTable, simInfo));
  }
  
  info->nMaxChannels = nMaxChannels == 0 ? info->nMaxChannels : nMaxChannels;
  return ncclSuccess;
}

7.2 模式确定

enqueue.cc:1979-2019 中的 calcCollChunking():

static ncclResult_t calcCollChunking(struct ncclComm* comm, struct ncclTaskColl* info, 
                                      int nChannels, size_t nBytes,
                                      uint32_t* outChunkSize, uint32_t* outDirectFlags, 
                                      struct ncclProxyOp* proxyOp) {
  ncclPattern_t pattern;
  
  switch (info->func) {
  case ncclFuncAllReduce:
    pattern =
      info->algorithm == NCCL_ALGO_NVLS ? ncclPatternNvls :
      info->algorithm == NCCL_ALGO_NVLS_TREE ? ncclPatternNvlsTree :
      info->algorithm == NCCL_ALGO_COLLNET_DIRECT ? ncclPatternCollnetDirect :
      info->algorithm == NCCL_ALGO_COLLNET_CHAIN ? ncclPatternCollnetChain :
      info->algorithm == NCCL_ALGO_TREE ? ncclPatternTreeUpDown :
      ncclPatternRingTwice;  // <--- RING算法使用ncclPatternRingTwice
    break;
  // ... 其他集合操作
  }
  
  // 计算chunk大小
  int chunkSteps = (info->protocol == NCCL_PROTO_SIMPLE && 
                    info->algorithm == NCCL_ALGO_RING) ? info->chunkSteps : 1;
  int sliceSteps = (info->protocol == NCCL_PROTO_SIMPLE && 
                    info->algorithm == NCCL_ALGO_RING) ? info->sliceSteps : 1;
  int chunkSize = stepSize*chunkSteps;
  
  return ncclSuccess;
}

7.3 AllReduce RING模式特征

对于AllReduce操作，RING算法使用 ncclPatternRingTwice 模式，意味着：

  1. Reduce-Scatter阶段: 数据沿环逐步规约
  2. AllGather阶段: 规约后的数据沿环广播

这在 enqueue.cc:2007-2014 中明确定义。

8. 关键数据结构

8.1 通道结构

struct ncclChannel {
  int id;  // 通道ID
  
  // 通道的peers数组（包含所有rank）
  struct ncclChannelPeer** peers;
  
  // Ring拓扑信息
  struct ncclRing ring;
  
  // Tree拓扑信息
  struct ncclTree tree;
  
  // CollNet信息
  struct ncclDirect collnetDirect;
  struct ncclTree collnetChain;
  
  // NVLS信息
  struct ncclNvls nvls;
};

8.2 连接器结构

struct ncclConnector {
  int connected;              // 是否已连接
  int hasSeen;
  int p2pOnly;
  struct ncclProxyConnector proxyConn;
  struct ncclTransportComm* transportComm;  // 传输层
  void* transportResources;
  struct ncclConnInfo conn;   // 连接信息
};

struct ncclConnInfo {
  char *buffs[NCCL_NUM_PROTOCOLS];  // 本地接收/远程发送的缓冲区
  void* mhandles[NCCL_NUM_PROTOCOLS];
  uint64_t *tail;     // 本地接收/远程发送的尾指针
  uint64_t *head;     // 本地发送/远程接收的头指针
  
  int flags;          // NCCL_DIRECT_NIC等标志
  int stepSize;       // SIMPLE协议的步长
  void **ptrExchange; // 直接通信的指针交换
  
  uint64_t step;      // 当前步数
  ncclNetDeviceHandle_t netDeviceHandle;
};

8.3 拓扑图结构

struct ncclTopoGraph {
  int id;          // 图ID (0=Tree, 1=Ring, 2=CollNetDirect, etc.)
  int pattern;     // 模式 (NCCL_TOPO_PATTERN_RING等)
  int crossNic;    // 是否跨NIC
  int collNet;     // 是否使用CollNet
  int minChannels;
  int maxChannels;
  int nChannels;   // 实际使用的通道数
  
  float bwIntra;   // 节点内带宽
  float bwInter;   // 节点间带宽
  float latencyInter;
  
  int typeIntra;   // 节点内链路类型 (PATH_NVL, PATH_PCI等)
  int typeInter;   // 节点间链路类型
  
  int sameChannels;
  int nHops;
  
  int* intra;      // 节点内rank排列 [nChannels*nNodes*nRanksPerNode]
  int64_t* inter;  // 节点间NET设备ID [nChannels*2]
};

9. 性能优化机制

9.1 调优参数

graph/tuning.cc:230-573 中的调优逻辑：

ncclResult_t ncclTopoTuneModel(struct ncclComm* comm, int minCompCap, int maxCompCap, 
                                struct ncclTopoGraph** graphs) {
  // 设置线程数阈值
  int simpleDefaultThreads = (graphs[NCCL_ALGO_RING]->bwIntra*graphs[NCCL_ALGO_RING]->nChannels 
                               <= PCI_BW) ? 256 : NCCL_SIMPLE_MAX_NTHREADS;
  comm->maxThreads[NCCL_ALGO_RING][NCCL_PROTO_SIMPLE] =
    getNthreads("NCCL_NTHREADS", ncclParamNthreads(), 2*WARP_SIZE, 
                 NCCL_SIMPLE_MAX_NTHREADS, simpleDefaultThreads);
  
  // 计算带宽和延迟
  for (int coll=0; coll<NCCL_NUM_FUNCTIONS; coll++) {
    for (int a=0; a<NCCL_NUM_ALGORITHMS; a++) {
      for (int p=0; p<NCCL_NUM_PROTOCOLS; p++) {
        float busBw = graphs[a]->nChannels * bw;
        
        // RING + LL 协议优化
        if (a == NCCL_ALGO_RING && p == NCCL_PROTO_LL) { 
          busBw = std::min(llMaxBw, busBw * .5); 
        }
        
        // RING + LL128 协议优化
        if (a == NCCL_ALGO_RING && p == NCCL_PROTO_LL128) 
          busBw = std::min(busBw * (0.92), graphs[a]->nChannels*perChMaxRingLL128Bw);
        
        // 将总线带宽转换为算法带宽
        if (a == NCCL_ALGO_RING || a == NCCL_ALGO_NVLS || a == NCCL_ALGO_NVLS_TREE) {
          float ratio = (1.0 * nRanks) / nsteps;
          busBw *= ratio;
        }
        
        comm->bandwidths[coll][a][p] = busBw;
        
        // 计算延迟
        if (a == NCCL_ALGO_RING) {
          float netOverhead = (nNodes > 1) ? getNetOverhead(comm) : 0.0;
          if (p == NCCL_PROTO_SIMPLE) netOverhead *= 3;
          
          intraLat = std::max(intraLat, netOverhead);
          int nInterSteps = nNodes == 1 ? 0 : 
                            coll == ncclFuncAllReduce ? 2*(nNodes-1) : nNodes-1;
          comm->latencies[coll][a][p] += (nsteps-nInterSteps)*intraLat + 
                                          nInterSteps*interLat;
        }
      }
    }
  }
  
  return ncclSuccess;
}

9.2 环境变量控制

可以通过以下环境变量强制使用RING算法：

# 强制所有操作使用RING算法
export NCCL_ALGO=RING

# 或针对特定操作
export NCCL_ALGO="allreduce:Ring"

# 强制使用特定协议
export NCCL_PROTO=Simple  # 或 LL, LL128

# 设置通道数
export NCCL_NCHANNELS=8

# 设置线程数
export NCCL_NTHREADS=512

9.3 寄存器缓冲区优化

register/coll_reg.cc:266-369 中针对RING算法的缓冲区注册：

if (info->algorithm == NCCL_ALGO_RING) {
  struct ncclReg* recvRegRecord = NULL;
  struct ncclReg* sendRegRecord = NULL;
  int sendNetPeers = comm->nChannels;
  int recvNetPeers = comm->nChannels;
  
  // 为每个通道收集网络连接器
  for (int c = 0; c < comm->nChannels; ++c) {
    struct ncclChannel* channel = comm->channels + c;
    int peer;
    struct ncclConnector* peerConn;
    
    // 获取prev peer的接收连接器
    peer = channel->ring.prev;
    peerConn = &channel->peers[peer]->recv[0];
    if (peerConn->conn.flags & NCCL_DIRECT_NIC) {
      recvNetConns[c] = peerConn;
      hasRecvNetPeer = true;
    }
    
    // 获取next peer的发送连接器
    peer = channel->ring.next;
    peerConn = &channel->peers[peer]->send[0];
    if (peerConn->conn.flags & NCCL_DIRECT_NIC) {
      sendNetConns[c] = peerConn;
      hasSendNetPeer = true;
    }
  }
  
  // 注册网络缓冲区（如果需要）
  if (hasSendNetPeer || hasRecvNetPeer) {
    if (comm->planner.persistent && ncclParamGraphRegister()) {
      // 图模式注册
      if ((regBufFlag || !hasSendNetPeer) && hasRecvNetPeer)
        ncclNetGraphRegisterBuffer(comm, info->recvbuff, recvbuffSize, 
                                     recvNetConns, recvNetPeers, &regBufFlag, 
                                     recvNetHandles, cleanupQueue, &info->nCleanupQueueElts);
    } else if (ncclParamLocalRegister()) {
      // 本地注册
      if ((regBufFlag || !hasSendNetPeer) && hasRecvNetPeer)
        ncclNetLocalRegisterBuffer(comm, info->recvbuff, recvbuffSize, 
                                     recvNetConns, recvNetPeers, &regBufFlag, recvNetHandles);
    }
  }
  
  if (regBufFlag) {
    info->regBufType |= NCCL_NET_REG_BUFFER;
    info->sendNetHandles = sendNetHandles;
    info->recvNetHandles = recvNetHandles;
    
    // 单GPU每节点优化
    if (comm->isOneRPN && (info->func == ncclFuncAllGather || 
                            info->func == ncclFuncBroadcast)) {
      info->nMaxChannels = 1;
    }
  }
}

10. 代码示例与跟踪路径

10.1 完整调用链（AllReduce RING）

用户调用: ncclAllReduce()
    ↓
enqueue.cc: ncclEnqueueCheck()
    ↓
enqueue.cc: getAlgoInfo()
    ├─> tuning.cc: updateCollCostTable()  // 填充代价表
    └─> tuning.cc: topoGetAlgoInfo()      // 选择最优算法
            ↓
        检测到 NCCL_ALGO=RING 或代价表选择RING
            ↓
enqueue.cc: calcCollChunking()
    └─> 确定 pattern = ncclPatternRingTwice
            ↓
enqueue.cc: addWorkBatchToPlan()
    └─> 添加工作批次到计划
            ↓
proxy.cc: ncclProxySaveOp()
    └─> 保存代理操作（如果需要网络传输）
            ↓
            根据 pattern == ncclPatternRingTwice:
            ├─> SaveProxy(proxyRecv, ring->prev, ...)  // 从prev接收
            └─> SaveProxy(proxySend, ring->next, ...)  // 发送到next
                    ↓
启动CUDA kernel执行实际的Reduce-Scatter + AllGather
    └─> 设备端代码执行环形算法

10.2 拓扑初始化调用链

init.cc: ncclCommInitRank()
    ↓
init.cc: ncclTopoGetSystem()
    ├─> topo.cc: 检测GPU和NET设备
    ├─> topo.cc: ncclTopoComputePaths()  // 计算所有路径
    └─> topo.cc: ncclTopoTrimSystem()    // 修剪不可达设备
            ↓
init.cc: ncclTopoSearchInit()
    └─> search.cc: 初始化搜索参数
            ↓
channel.cc: initChannel()  // 为每个算法初始化通道
    └─> 为RING算法: graph = &comm->graphs[NCCL_ALGO_RING]
            ↓
search.cc: ncclTopoCompute(system, graph)
    ├─> ncclTopoSearchRec()  // 递归搜索最佳拓扑
    │     ├─> ncclTopoSearchRecNet()  // 跨节点：从NET开始
    │     └─> ncclTopoSearchRecGpu()  // 节点内：从GPU开始
    │             ├─> ncclTopoSearchNextGpuSort()  // GPU排序
    │             └─> ncclTopoFollowPath()         // 沿路径分配带宽
    │
    └─> ncclTopoDupChannels()  // 复制通道以增加并行度
            ↓
rings.cc: ncclBuildRings()
    └─> 验证环的完整性和闭合性
            ↓
transport/generic.cc: ncclTransportRingConnect()
    ├─> transport.cc: ncclTransportP2pConnect()  // 标记连接
    └─> transport.cc: ncclTransportP2pSetup()    // 建立传输层
            ├─> 为每个peer交换连接信息
            └─> selectTransport()  // 选择SHM/P2P/NET
                    ↓
                根据传输类型调用：
                ├─> shm.cc: shmSendSetup() / shmRecvSetup()
                ├─> p2p.cc: p2pSendSetup() / p2pRecvSetup()
                └─> net.cc: netSendSetup() / netRecvSetup()

10.3 关键文件索引

文件路径主要功能关键函数
src/http://init.cc通信器初始化ncclCommInitRank(), ncclTopoGetSystem()
src/graph/http://search.cc拓扑搜索算法ncclTopoCompute(), ncclTopoSearchRec()
src/graph/http://rings.ccRING拓扑构建ncclBuildRings()
src/graph/http://tuning.cc性能调优ncclTopoTuneModel(), topoGetAlgoInfo()
src/http://enqueue.cc操作入队getAlgoInfo(), calcCollChunking()
src/transport/http://generic.cc传输层连接ncclTransportRingConnect()
src/http://transport.ccP2P传输设置ncclTransportP2pConnect(), ncclTransportP2pSetup()
src/transport/http://shm.cc共享内存传输shmSendSetup(), shmRecvSetup()
src/transport/http://p2p.ccP2P传输p2pSendSetup(), p2pRecvSetup()
src/transport/http://net.cc网络传输netSendSetup(), netRecvSetup()
src/register/http://coll_reg.cc缓冲区注册ncclRegisterCollNvlsBuffers()
src/http://proxy.cc代理操作ncclProxySaveOp()
src/include/device.h设备端数据结构ncclRing, ncclChannel, ncclConnector

10.4 调试跟踪示例

要追踪RING算法的执行，可以启用以下NCCL调试环境变量：

# 显示拓扑信息
export NCCL_DEBUG=INFO
export NCCL_DEBUG_SUBSYS=INIT,GRAPH,TOPO

# 强制使用RING算法
export NCCL_ALGO=RING

# 设置通道数和线程数
export NCCL_NCHANNELS=4
export NCCL_NTHREADS=512

# 运行程序
./your_nccl_program

# 输出示例：
# [INFO] INIT : ncclCommInitRank: comm 0x... rank 0 nranks 8
# [INFO] GRAPH : Search 1 : 4 channels found (ring) at 40.0GB/s
# [INFO] INIT : Connected all rings, use ring PXN 0 GDR 1
# [INFO] INIT : Channel 00 : 0[0] -> 1[1] -> 2[2] -> 3[3] -> 0[0]
# [INFO] INIT : Using Ring algorithm for AllReduce

10.5 Nsight Systems追踪

使用Nsight Systems可以可视化RING算法的执行时间线：

nsys profile -o nccl_ring_trace \
    --trace=cuda,nvtx,osrt \
    --cuda-graph-trace=node \
    ./your_nccl_program

在追踪中可以看到：

  • NCCL Kernel执行: 环形Reduce-Scatter和AllGather kernel
  • GPU间通信: P2P传输或网络传输的时间
  • 同步开销: ring中各步骤的同步点

总结

NCCL的2D RING ALLREDUCE并非独立的算法实现，而是RING算法在多节点多GPU环境下的自然扩展：

  • 拓扑构建阶段：通过 ncclTopoCompute() 搜索最优的GPU环形排列
  • 连接建立阶段：为每个GPU建立到prev和next peer的传输层连接
  • 执行阶段：AllReduce被分解为Reduce-Scatter和AllGather两个环形操作

关键优化点包括：

  • 智能GPU排序：优先选择带宽高、跳数少的路径
  • 多通道并行：通过多个环形通道提高吞吐量
  • 协议选择：根据数据大小自动选择LL/LL128/Simple协议
  • 缓冲区注册：使用GDR和本地注册减少内存拷贝开销

通过深入理解这些代码流程，可以更好地针对特定硬件和网络拓扑优化NCCL性能。
